title: LanguageDetection probe output
description: Slice of repo-context produced by the LanguageDetection probe (Layer A). Wrapped under `language_stack` to match localv2 §5.1 A1 and the arch §Gap 4 prelude-pass shape; primary may be null for an empty repo. Strict at the slice — sets the precedent Phase 1 probes inherit (ADR-0013). S2-01 (Phase 1) extends the slice with `framework_hints` and `monorepo`; `warnings[]` and `errors[]` are declared optional with the ADR-0007 ID pattern constraint on item strings (typed-exception IDs go in `ProbeOutput.errors`, not in the slice — the slice's arrays exist for forward-compatible soft-degrade signals).

counts.description: Map of language name (lowercased) to file count detected by the probe.

primary.description: The language with the highest count (ties broken by alphabetical order); null when no files were detected.

framework_hints.description: Sorted, deduped list of detected Node-framework names (from a fixed seed dict over dependencies + devDependencies).

monorepo.description: Monorepo detection block — null when no marker hit. `tool` is the highest-precedence hit; `markers` is the sorted union of all hit marker filenames (basenames only).

warnings.description: Forward-compatible soft-degrade signals. Each item must match the ADR-0007 ID pattern. Phase 1 emits no values here; the slice exists for future probes / phases.

errors.description: Forward-compatible typed-exception IDs. Each item must match the ADR-0007 ID pattern. Phase 1 emits typed IDs on `ProbeOutput.errors` (not here); the slice exists for future probes that may carry per-slice error context.
